item.title: Guohui's Notes
item.description: A collection of technical notes and learnings

item.title: Zotero
item.description: Zotero is a free reference manager that helps you collect, organize, cite, and share research sources.

item.title: VS Code
item.description: Introduction Visual Studio Code (VS Code) is a free, powerful, cross-platform code editor.

item.title: Obsidian
item.description: Tips and tricks for using the Obsidian editor effectively

item.title: Markdown
item.description: Introduction Markdown is a lightweight markup language that uses plain text formatting syntax.

item.title: LaTeX
item.description: Introduction LaTeX (pronounced “LAH-tekh” or “LAY-tekh”) is a typesetting system widely used in academia, especially in mathematics, physics, and computer science.

item.title: GitHub
item.description: Using GitHub from terminal and VSCode

item.title: Ollama
item.description: Ollama is a tool for running large language models (LLMs) locally on your machine.
